title: SkillBridge
description: A full-stack web platform connecting skilled volunteers with NGOs for short-term and long-term opportunities, with role-based authentication and real-time application tracking.

title: Contact Manager
description: A MERN stack contact management app to store and manage personal contact details like name, phone, and email with a clean, intuitive interface.

title: Portfolio
